floor.os: Windows 10 x64 (2015)+. Old HARDWARE (~2008 and newer) is fully supported when running Win10 — the deliberate exclusion is dead OSes (XP/Vista/7/8): every modern runtime (Chromium, Node, Python, Microsoft's own tools) dropped them, so shipping there means shipping unpatchable security holes. Rationale: docs/PACKAGING.md.
floor.later: arm64 build — the PowerShell path is architecture-neutral

powershell.role: PowerShell 5.1 + .NET Framework (SendKeys, UIAutomation, System.Drawing, mouse P/Invoke) — part of Windows 10/11 itself. Entire surface validated on the GrantW laptop 2026-07-11, zero bugs.

pwsh.role: PowerShell 7 — interpreter fallback rung only (covers pwsh-only boxes); never required

note: The leanest cocktail of the four: Electron (bundled) + frozen python (bundled) + our code. Windows itself provides every external tool.
signing: Code signing strongly recommended (Azure Trusted Signing, ~$10/mo) or SmartScreen shows 'unrecognized app' and scares users off. GRANT ACTION.
